/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dungeon.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/dungeon.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dungeon.dir/game.cpp.o -o ../bin/dungeon  ../engine/libkairo_engine.a ../libglad.a ../libstb.a ../libimgui.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 ../liblua.a ../libminiaudio.a -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -lpthread
